---
name: New Detection Request
about: Suggest an SDK, framework, or token pattern to add
title: "[Detection] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What should be detected?**
Name of the SDK / framework / token type.

**Type**
- [ ] LLM SDK
- [ ] AI Framework
- [ ] Token / API Key pattern
- [ ] API Endpoint
- [ ] Model reference

**Example code or pattern**
```
# How it appears in source code
from new_ai_lib import Client
client = Client(api_key="prefix_abc123...")
```

**Token format (if applicable)**
Describe the prefix and structure, e.g.: `prefix_` followed by 40 alphanumeric characters.

- Documentation:
